examples: His contempt for Teutonism in the international arena and eugenics within a society made him one of Nazism's earliest foes.
For a while he also promoted eugenics.
Needless to say, Murtaugh and Schlax are not advocating eugenics.
He became so detested because of his eugenics theories and his obsession with eugenics theories.
The Carnegie Institution and Rockefeller Foundation supported eugenics programmes in Germany into the 1930s, for example.
